steps.label: cause
steps.text: Individually selected Aszu berries have been concentrated by noble rot and are added to fermenting must or base wine.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Maceration and mixing extract the berries' concentrated sugar, acidity, flavour and botrytis-derived compounds into the liquid.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The resulting Tokaji Aszu gains sweetness, concentration and characteristic botrytised complexity while retaining balancing acidity.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: adding selected botrytised Aszu berries transfers their concentrated sugar, acid and flavour into the wine.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
